title: Fortress
description: Fortress is a 5-input sequential video switching engine for analog video rate signals: a performance-oriented, voltage-addressable input router with a dedicated programming interface—use it to build rhythmic cuts, long-form sequences, and CV-driven channel gymnastics. The community Manual route may surface forum archive content where no single PDF exists; the Specs tab lists the hardware as catalogued.

seo.title: Fortress | LZX Industries
seo.description: Fortress: 5-input sequence video switch (LZX). Manual, forum archive, Specs on lzxindustries.com.
